'''Tira Gama Solo''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was the mother of [[Tiion Sal-Solo]] and [[Jonash Solo]]. She was the grandmother of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]. She was married to [[Denn Solo]]. After she gave birth, the planet was attacked by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], forcing the family to flee. Splitting up in the confusion, Tira took Tiion while Den fled with Jonash, never to be seen again. When she returned to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], her father erased her memories of her husband, to ease her loss.
